title: galeopsis tetrahit var. reichenbachii
intro: Galeopsis tetrahit var. reichenbachii, also known as the red galeopsis or red hemp nettle, is a variant of the Galeopsis tetrahit plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis tetrahit var. reichenbachii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to alleviate symptoms.
